message:
feat(fwc): add fallback routing with circuit-breaker integration for CUAL-N.3

CircuitBreakerRegistry: per-connector state tracking with error-rate windowing
FallbackEligibility: Eligible/SuggestOnly/NotEligible for idempotency safety
evaluate_fallback(): transparent fallback decisions (auto/suggest/no-fallback)
Full lifecycle: trip → fallback → probe (half-open) → recover
40 tests covering registry, eligibility, evaluation, serialization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
